revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Manichaeism footer |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |title = [[Manichaeism]] |image = [[File:Seal_of_Mani_(cleaned_up)._Seal_with_figure_of_Mani,_possibly_3rd_century_CE,_possibly_Irak._Cabinet_des_Médailles,_Paris.jpg|100px|alt=Seal with figure of Mani, possibly 3rd century CE, possibly Irak. Cabinet des Médailles, Paris|link=Sealstone of Mani]] |listclass = hlist |above =
|group1 = Prophets |list1 = * [[Mani (prophet)|Mani]] (Founder) * [[Jesus in Manichaeism|Jesus]] * [[The Buddha in Manichaeism|Sakyamuni]] * [[Zarathustra in Manichaeism|Zarathustra]] * [[Narayana]] * [[Seth]]
|group2 = [[Manichaean scripture|Scripture]] |list2 = * [[Seven treatises of Manichaeism]] ([[Gospel of Mani]], [[Treasure of Life]], [[The Epistles (Manichaeism)|The Epistles]], [[The Book of Mysteries (Manichaeism)|The Book of Mysteries]], [[Pragmateia]], [[The Book of Giants]], [[Psalms and Prayers]]) * ''[[Arzhang|Book of Pictures]]'' * ''[[Shabuhragan]]''
|group3 = Extracanonical</br> literature |list3 = * [[New Testament]] * [[Fundamental Epistle]] * [[Manichaean Psalm Book]] * [[Psalms of Thomas]] * [[Kephalaia]] * [[Xuastvanift]] * [[Cologne Mani-Codex]] * [[Medinet Madi library]] * [[Dunhuang Manichaean texts]] ** [[Xiabuzan]] ** [[Manichaean Compendium]] ** [[Incomplete scripture of Manichaeism]] ** [[Irk Bitig]]† * [[Turpan Manichaean texts]] ** [[Sogdian-language Manichaean letter]] * [[Xiapu Manichaean manuscripts]] ** ''[[Moni Guangfo]]''
|group4 = [[Manichaean theology|Theology]] |list4 = * [[Father of Greatness]] * [[Prince of Darkness (Manichaeism)|Prince of Darkness]] * [[Zarathustra in Manichaeism]] * [[The Buddha in Manichaeism]] * [[Jesus in Manichaeism]] * [[Two Principles and Three Moments]] * [[Gnosis]] * [[Mani (prophet)|Messenger of Light]] * [[Xroshtag and Padvaxtag]] * [[Archon (Gnosticism)#Manichaeism|''Archon'']] * [[Asrestar]]
|group5 = [[Manichaeism#History|History]] |list5 = * [[Apostles (Manichaeism)|Apostles]] * [[Mar Ammo]] * [[Mar Sisin]] * [[Akouas|Mar Zaku]] * [[Mar Adda]] * [[Shad Ohrmazd]] * [[Mihr (Manichaeism)|Mihr]] * [[Faustus of Mileve|Faustus]] * [[Agapius (Manichaean)|Agapius]] * [[Aphthonius of Alexandria|Aphthonius]] * [[Hegemonius]] * [[Marcus (Manichean)|Marcus]] * ''[[Three Persian religions]]'' * [[Huichang Persecution of Buddhism|Huichang Persecution of Manichaeism]] * [[Bögü Qaghan]] * [[Sergius-Tychicus]] * [[East–West schism (Manichaeism)|East-West Schism]] * [[Amr ibn Adi]] * [[Abū Hilāl al-Dayhūri]] * [[Lü Shinang]] * [[Synod of Gangra]] * [[Lin Deng]] * [[Manichaeism#Persecution and extinction|Persecution]] * [[Uyghur Khaganate]] * [[Cangnan Stele]] * [[Qianku]]
|group6 = Sects |list6 = * [[See of Babylon (Manichaeism)|See of Babylon]] * [[Denawars]] * [[Astati]] * [[Chinese Manichaeism]] * [[Manichaean schisms|Miqlāsiyya]]
|group7 = [[Manichaeism#The Manichaean Church|Organisation]] |list7 = * [[Archegos (Manichaeism)|Archegos]] * Patriarch * Apostle * Bishop * Presbyter * Elect * Hearers
|group8 = Commandments |list8 = * [[Three Seals (Manichaeism)|Three Seals]] <!-- * [[Five Pure Precepts]] * [[Seven Practices]] * [[Ten Precepts (Manichaeism)|Ten Precepts]] * [[Twelve Dharma Signs]] * [[Fifteen Repentances]] --> * [[Pañcavidyā]]
|group9 = Rituals |list9 = * [[Eucharist]] * [[Evangelism]] * [[Repentance]] * [[Fasting]]
|group10 = Buildings |list10 = * [[Cao'an]] * {{ill|Puxi Fushou Palace|zh|浦西境福寿宫}} * {{ill|Flying Road Pagoda|zh|飞路塔}} * {{ill|Leshan Temple|zh|乐山堂}}
|group11 = [[Manichaean art|Visual art]] |list11 = * ''[[Birth of Mani]]'' * ''[[Arzhang|Book of Pictures]]'' * ''[[Manichaean Diagram of the Universe|Diagram of the Universe]]'' * ''[[Episodes from Mani's Missionary Work]]'' * ''[[Icon of Mani]]'' * [[Leaf from a Manichaean book MIK III 4959]] * [[Leaf from a Manichaean book MIK III 4974]] * [[Leaf from a Manichaean book MIK III 4979]] * [[Leaf from a Manichaean book MIK III 6368]] * [[Leaf from a Manichaean book MIK III 8259]] * ''[[Mani's Community Established]]'' * ''[[Mani's Parents]]'' * [[Manichaean stone reliefs of Shangwan village]] * [[Manichaean temple banner MIK III 6286]] * [[Manichaean wall painting MIK III 6918]] * ''[[Manichaean Painting of the Buddha Jesus|Painting of the Buddha Jesus]]'' * [[Sealstone of Mani]] * ''[[Sermon on Mani's Teaching of Salvation]]'' * ''[[Veneration of the Tree of Life]]''
|group12 = Writing system |list12 = * [[Manichaean script]] * [[Manichaean (Unicode block)]]
|group13 = In fiction |list13 = * [[Ming Cult]] * ''[[The Gardens of Light]]'' * ''[[Story of the Twin Dragons of Great Tang]]'' * ''[[The Secret of Heaven]]''
|belowstyle = |below = ''Notes'': † mainly a Tengrist text but recorded in a Manichaean monastery
}}<noinclude> [[Category:Manichaeism]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing placeholder pages to clear up the wanted pages
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Manichaeism_footer]]: importing for the meme

Text replacement - "[[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] </noinclude>" to "<includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>"
Text replacement - "<includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}]]</includeonly>" to "[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}]]"
revision.text: [[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Manichaeism footer]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Erroneous transclusions of Manichaeism footer
Bot: remove deleted category New automatic wikipedia redirects
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23513454770|commit triggered pipeline]]
